languages.original_text: "Have faith in our Lord Captain, Abelard. It's fully in keeping with the legacy Theodora left behind, and she always knew what she was doing. Almost always..."

languages.text: "Доверься нашему Лорд-капитану, Абеляр. Это вполне в духе того наследства, которое оставила Теодора, а она всегда знала, что делала. Почти всегда..."
"Have faith in our Lord Captain, Abelard. It's fully in keeping with the legacy Theodora left behind, and she always knew what she was doing. Almost always..."

languages.text: 「アベルアルド船長、神に祈りを捧げましょう。これはテオドラが遺した遺産に沿った行動です。彼女はいつも自分の行動を理解していました。ほとんどの場合ね…」
languages.original_text: "Have faith in our Lord Captain, Abelard. It's fully in keeping with the legacy Theodora left behind, and she always knew what she was doing. Almost always..."

traits.locale_text: 「アベルアルド船長、神に祈りを捧げましょう。これはテオドラが遺した遺産に沿った行動です。彼女はいつも自分の行動を理解していました。ほとんどの場合ね…」

languages.text: « Ayez foi en notre {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, Abélard. {mf|Il|Elle} se comporte comme {mf|un digne héritier|une digne héritière} de Théodora, qui savait toujours ce qu'elle faisait. Enfin, presque toujours... »
languages.original_text: "Have faith in our Lord Captain, Abelard. It's fully in keeping with the legacy Theodora left behind, and she always knew what she was doing. Almost always..."

traits.locale_text: « Ayez foi en notre {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, Abélard. {mf|Il|Elle} se comporte comme {mf|un digne héritier|une digne héritière} de Théodora, qui savait toujours ce qu'elle faisait. Enfin, presque toujours... »

languages.text: "Vertraut unserem Lord Captain, Abelard. Das entspricht alles Theodoras Vermächtnis. Sie wusste immer, was sie tut. Fast immer ..."
languages.original_text: "Have faith in our Lord Captain, Abelard. It's fully in keeping with the legacy Theodora left behind, and she always knew what she was doing. Almost always..."

traits.locale_text: "Vertraut unserem Lord Captain, Abelard. Das entspricht alles Theodoras Vermächtnis. Sie wusste immer, was sie tut. Fast immer ..."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan'a biraz güven Abelard. Theodora'nın bıraktığı mirasa pek uygun bir hareket. Üstelik o daima ne yaptığını bilirdi. Sayılır yani..."
languages.original_text: "Have faith in our Lord Captain, Abelard. It's fully in keeping with the legacy Theodora left behind, and she always knew what she was doing. Almost always..."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan'a biraz güven Abelard. Theodora'nın bıraktığı mirasa pek uygun bir hareket. Üstelik o daima ne yaptığını bilirdi. Sayılır yani..."

languages.text: «Tenga fe en {mf|nuestro|nuestra} Lord Capitán, Abelard. Actúa acorde al legado de Theodora, y ella siempre sabía lo que se hacía. Casi siempre...».
languages.original_text: "Have faith in our Lord Captain, Abelard. It's fully in keeping with the legacy Theodora left behind, and she always knew what she was doing. Almost always..."

traits.locale_text: «Tenga fe en {mf|nuestro|nuestra} Lord Capitán, Abelard. Actúa acorde al legado de Theodora, y ella siempre sabía lo que se hacía. Casi siempre...».

languages.text: “要对我们的舰长大人有信心，阿贝拉德。这完全符合西奥多拉留下的传统，她总是那么胸有成竹。几乎总是……”
